rationale: Bug hunt C29: 0 bugs (talent system .get() chaining handles all edge cases). Feature: All 8 biomes shared identical green fog, golden pollen, and green fireflies regardless of selection. Sky color and sun color were hardcoded to broceliande values. Created BiomeParticleProfiles with 8 unique atmospheres. Each biome now has distinct fog density/color, ambient particles (pollen/dust/spray/embers), accent effects (fireflies/wisps/sparks), falling particles (leaves/snow/rain/ash), and ground mist. BiomeWalkConfigs now drives sun, fill light, and sky background per biome. Marais gets thick green fog + will-o-wisps, cotes gets sea spray + bright blue sky, cercles gets cold silver mist + snow, iles gets aurora shimmer + ethereal glow.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C30: verify BiomeParticleProfiles loads correctly for all 8 biomes, confirm no null access in forest_effects.gd for empty particle layers. Feature candidates: biome-specific creature spawning (different animals per biome), encounter card biome flavor text, or hub journal/run history viewer.
